problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
